title: Torterras O' Plenty
description: Cobblemon Addon that adds Torterra forms for Biomes O' Plenty trees!
body:
A simple addon for Cobblemon that adds unique Torterra forms for all 20 tree types from the Biomes O' Plenty mod. See the Image Gallery for a complete list of all the added forms and their shiny variants! **INSTALLATION** - Ensure both Cobblemon and Biomes O' Plenty are installed. - Drop one copy of "Torterras O' Plenty.zip" into your world's datapacks folder, and another copy in your resourcepacks folder. - Enable the Torterras O' Plenty resource pack in game. - Done!
**Getting the New Forms**
Just like the special Torterra forms using vanilla trees, all you need to do is give a Grotle a sapling from the Biomes O' Plenty mod. When it's ready to evolve, you should see a second option for its unique form!
